name: Spotify Core
description: Shared Spotify connection for the spotify_* widgets. Paste your Spotify app's Client ID + Secret here, then connect your account once at Plugins → Spotify. Holds the OAuth tokens so every Spotify widget shows your now-playing track. No widget cell of its own.

settings.name: client_secret
settings.label: Client Secret
settings.help: Stored as client_secret_secret on disk. Add the redirect URI shown at Plugins → Spotify to your app's settings before connecting.
